problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Nanoparticle. Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
